subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of Names and Creator of heaven! I bear witness in this station of mine to Thy oneness and Thy singleness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الاسماء و فاطر السماء اشهد فی موقفی هذا بوحدانیتک و فردانیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
